candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue total; includes all operating revenue components and is standard for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; only included as lower-priority fallback per instructions allowing multiple candidates.
Appears to be a balancing line tied to operating revenue; used as secondary fallback after explicit Total Revenue.
Minor financial income component, not core sales; low-relevance fallback only.

variables.notes: Total Revenue clearly represents consolidated sales; Operating revenue - Balancing value kept as secondary in case of historical label changes.

candidates.why: Standard COGS line capturing direct production costs.

candidates.row_label: Change in stock of biological assets at cost, raw materials and finished poducts
candidates.why: Inventory/biological assets change adjustment; could be part of cost of sales but is an adjustment rather than primary COGS.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Use pure COGS line; inventory change line is excluded to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Personnel and related overhead costs; classic SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket excluding COGS and D&A; fits SG&A.
Equity compensation typically classified within SG&A; even if values not shown here, semantically correct.
Mixed operating income/expense bucket; likely includes overhead-type items but less precise.

variables.notes: Multiple SG&A components selected as allowed; no single explicit SG&A total exists, so main overhead buckets are used.
No R&D-related row present among candidates; treated as zero for PROF.

candidates.why: Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; not preferred for XINT which targets expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense on lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Main aggregate interest expense line; best single proxy for XINT.
Additional interest costs detail; relevant if main Interest Expenses missing in some years.
Interest capitalized to assets, not expensed; should generally be excluded from XINT.
Represents share of profit attributable to minority owners, not interest.
Profit attributable to parent shareholders, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest expense; good fallback for lease-related interest.
Liability for interest already incurred; balance sheet stock, not period expense.
Principal of debt, not interest expense.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders, not interest.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity, not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority given to aggregate Interest Expenses; other interest-cost lines kept as historical/coverage fallbacks. Capitalized interest excluded.

candidates.why: Component of equity (contributed capital) but not total book equity.
Retained earnings/earned portion of equity, not total.
Portion of equity including reserves; still a component, not full total.
Total equity attributable (likely to parent only); valid measure of book equity.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; best single book equity measure for PROF.
Represents total assets/capitalization; includes liabilities, not pure equity.

variables.notes: Use Total equity (which includes NCI) as primary book equity; Total Equity as secondary if needed.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to minority interests; reflects flow, not stock, but confirms presence of NCI.
Profit attributable to parent, not minority interest.
Balance sheet line for equity attributable to minority shareholders; primary choice for MIB.
Alternative label for same concept; useful as fallback across periods.

variables.notes: MIB targets the balance sheet minority interest; both NCI labels on the balance sheet are included as priority list.
